To change encoding JetBrains MPS uses for a file, a directory, or the entire project, add its path if necessary and then select encoding from the encoding list. Built-in file encoding (e.g. JSP, HTML or XML) overrides encoding you specify here. If not specified, files and directories inherit encoding settings from the parent directory or from the Project Encoding.
